    F

    findBest2(Collection<N>, boolean, boolean, MetricKeeper...) - Static method in class gametree.GameTreeNode
    Calculate the best 2 nodes from the perspective specified by the maximizing and by_optimistic flags.
    findBest2_test1() - Method in class test.Test_GameTreeNode
    Tests expected output from GameTreeNode.findBest2(java.util.Collection, boolean, boolean, gametree.MetricKeeper...).
    findBest2_test2() - Method in class test.Test_GameTreeNode
    Tests expected output from GameTreeNode.findBest2(java.util.Collection, boolean, boolean, gametree.MetricKeeper...).
    findBest2_test3() - Method in class test.Test_GameTreeNode
    Tests expected output from GameTreeNode.findBest2(java.util.Collection, boolean, boolean, gametree.MetricKeeper...).
    FIXED - Static variable in interface gametree.Generator.Width
    A default generator which always returns the maximum branching factor.
    flush() - Static method in class experiment.CompareAlgorithms
     
    fontSize - Variable in class visualizer.TreeToXML
     
    force_relevance_chance - Variable in class gametree.ArtificialGamePosition.Settings
    Parameter r, relevance chance, only relevant when the growth factor g is greater than 1.
    force_relevance_chance - Variable in class gametree.VariantAGP.Settings
    Parameter r, relevance chance, only relevant when the growth factor g is greater than 1.
    forceRelevance() - Method in record class gametree.VariantAGP.NodeInfo
    Returns the value of the forceRelevance record component.
    freeTable(Table, Table[], boolean[], int[], int) - Static method in class experiment.CompareAlgorithms
    Frees the provided table.
    freeze() - Method in class gametree.SearchTreeNode
    SearchTreeNode.setTreeFrozen(boolean) with frozen = true.
    fromFile(String) - Static method in class gametree.GameTreeNode
     
    frozen - Variable in class gametree.SearchTreeNode.Settings
